news.headline: Cult launches blockchain powered by $XION to make crypto disappear, blending technology with culture.
news.summary: The innovative company XION, based in New York, is gaining momentum thanks to its dedicated community and commitment to innovation. By combining cutting-edge blockchain technology with a deep understanding of cultural trends, XION is making cryptocurrency more user-friendly and accessible. Established in 2024, XION stands out as the pioneer of walletless blockchain solutions, redefining the crypto landscape.

news.headline: SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. will present at Abu Dhabi Finance Week on Dec. 5, 2024. Bill Stone, Chairman and CEO, to represent.
news.summary: Today, on December 5, 2024, in Windsor, Connecticut, SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SSNC) disclosed that Bill Stone, the Chairman and CEO, will be speaking at Abu Dhabi. SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. specializes in delivering software and software-enabled services to the financial services and healthcare sectors on a global scale.

news.headline: Locus Robotics helps GEODIS pick 10M units at U.S. site, driving productivity gains with automation technology.
news.summary: Locus Robotics has revealed that its advanced warehouse automation technology has significantly improved productivity at GEODIS' facility in Carlisle, Pennsylvania. The announcement was made on December 5, 2024, in Wilmington, Massachusetts. Locus Robotics, known for its expertise in this field, shared that GEODIS, a prominent global company, has experienced notable efficiency gains thanks to their technology implementation.

news.headline: Over 1/3 of women in 10 practices paid for AI in mammograms; 21% more likely to detect cancer.
news.summary: In Chicago, a study conducted on December 5, 2024, revealed that over 33% of women in 10 healthcare facilities opted for a self-pay AI-boosted breast cancer screening scheme. These enrolled women had a 21% higher chance of cancer detection compared to those who did not opt for the program.

news.headline: 2024 Understanding China Conference in Guangzhou saw over 600 participants from various sectors.
news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, on December 3, 2024, the 2024 Understanding China Conference was held at the Guangzhou Yuexiu International Congress Center. More than 600 individuals from various sectors including political, strategic, business, academic, and think tanks participated in the conference.

news.headline: FranShares and Sloan Capital collaborate to expand Everbowl locations in Texas via passive franchise investment platform.
news.summary: Today, FranShares, a prominent passive franchise investment platform, announced a collaboration with Sloan Capital to facilitate the expansion of a Southern California-based superfood chain into Texas. This strategic partnership aims to drive growth and increase market presence. The investment opportunity offers investors a chance to participate in the expansion project. This move comes as part of FranShares' efforts to expand its portfolio and tap into the thriving Texas market. The collaboration is set to propel the superfood chain's presence in Texas, providing a significant opportunity for growth and market penetration. This venture signifies a promising trajectory for both FranShares and the superfood chain, leveraging Sloan Capital's expertise for successful expansion.

Storage Post enters Chicago with 5 locations in high-traffic neighborhoods, strategically surrounding downtown.
news.summary: Storage Post Self Storage recently expanded into the Midwest market by acquiring five top-tier self-storage facilities in Chicagoland. This move marks a milestone for the company as it enters one of the busiest cities in the country. The acquired facilities strategically surround downtown Chicago and are situated in high-traffic, densely populated areas. These locations are in Albany Park, 3215 W. Lawrence Ave., Chicago, IL, and other key neighborhoods.

news.headline: Global horticultural ingredient market poised to reach US$35.7 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 5.3%; North American market at US$8.67 billion by 2034 with Mexico holding 19.9% share. Major players include ABC Fruits, AgroAmerica, APKA Industries, and Ceres Organics.
news.summary: The global Horticultural Ingredients Market is expected to reach a value of US$21.3 billion in 2024, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.3% from 2024 to 2034. These natural substances derived from plants are in high demand across various sectors due to their environmental benefits. By 2034, the market is forecasted to be worth US$35.7 billion, with South Korea's market growing at a CAGR of 6%, capturing 23.1% of the East Asia region's market share. The North American market is set to reach US$8.67 billion by 2034, with Mexico holding 19.9% of the market share. The fruits segment is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.1% between 2024 and 2034. The use of natural horticultural ingredients is gaining popularity over synthetic alternatives due to their biodegradability and eco-friendliness. Major players in the industry include ABC Fruits, AgroAmerica, APKA Industries, and Ceres Organics, among others.

news.headline: Binance updates leverage for USDⓈ-M perpetual contracts like NEAR, AVAX, and XLM. Existing positions unchanged.
news.summary: Binance Futures has adjusted leverage and margin tiers for various USDⓈ-M perpetual contracts, including those for popular cryptocurrencies such as NEAR, AVAX, and XLM. This update will affect traders using these contracts on the platform. It is important to note that existing positions will not be impacted by these changes. For more detailed information, please refer to the original source.

news.headline: Delegates: OPEC+ is still discussing duration of delay, with 3 months in focus.
Delegates: OPEC+ has deal in principle to delay output hike.

Tuniu announced unaudited Q3 2024 financial results, with net revenue at RMB186.0 million (US$26.5 million), a 4.4% increase YoY. Gross profit increased by 6.1% YoY to RMB121.8 million (US$17.4 million). Operating expenses rose by 11.5% YoY to RMB92.6 million (US$13.2 million). Net income was RMB43.9 million (US$6.3 million). Company has RMB1.3 billion (US$185.8 million) cash & cash equivalents. For Q4 2024, net revenue expected to be RMB100.0 million - RMB105.0 million. Share repurchase program ongoing with approximately 6.2 million ADSs repurchased for around US$5.6 million. Live webcast available for conference call discussing financial results. Non-GAAP financial measures provided.
news.summary: Tuniu Corporation, a prominent online leisure travel company in China, reported its unaudited financial results for the third quarter of 2024, achieving its highest quarterly profit since its listing. The net revenues for the quarter were RMB186.0 million (US$26.5 million), marking a 4.4% increase from the same period in 2023. Packaged tours revenues were RMB159.3 million (US$22.7 million), up 6.2% year-over-year. The company had cash and cash equivalents totaling RMB1.3 billion (US$185.8 million) as of September 30, 2024. For the fourth quarter, Tuniu expects net revenues to range from RMB100.0 million to RMB105.0 million, which is a 0% to 5% increase from 2023. Additionally, as part of a share repurchase program, the company had repurchased around 6.2 million ADSs for roughly US$5.6 million. Tuniu's management will host an earnings conference call to discuss these financial results. The company provides a wide range of packaged tours and travel-related services to leisure travelers through its online and offline platforms.

news.headline: Emurgo exec Amarpreet Singh stresses importance of interoperability for blockchain networks. #GlobalBusiness #Interoperability
news.summary: Amarpreet Singh, the global head of business development at Emurgo, emphasized the importance of interoperability in the blockchain industry during an interview with Cointelegraph. Singh highlighted that interoperability is crucial for the seamless exchange of information and value across different blockchain networks. Singh's insights shed light on the growing trend towards interconnected blockchain ecosystems.

news.headline: Hong Kong proposes amendments to Banking Ordinance to boost stability; seeks public input in consultation.
news.summary: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has initiated a public consultation regarding proposed modifications to the Banking Ordinance in an effort to bolster regulatory structures and improve banking stability. This move seeks to address potential loopholes in the current system and ensure the robustness of the financial sector. The consultation invites feedback from stakeholders and the general public, with a focus on key areas such as risk management, compliance standards, and capital requirements. The proposals aim to fortify the resilience of banks in the face of economic uncertainties and potential risks. It is crucial for stakeholders to actively participate in the consultation process to contribute to the enhancement of the banking sector's stability.

news.headline: Majority of French prefer presidential election in 2025
French poll shows 54% want President Macron to resign - le Point.
Kareo rebrands as Tebra for an all-in-one EHR solution. Website transition on Dec. 5 to www.tebra.com.
news.summary: The healthcare software provider for independent practices, Kareo, will merge with Tebra and rebrand under the Tebra name to enhance the all-in-one EHR solution. Starting on December 5, 2023, the Kareo website, kareo.com, will transition to Tebra’s unified platform at www.tebra.com. This integration signifies the finalization of Kareo's merger into Tebra, providing a wider range of features tailored for independent practices.

news.headline: Schneider Electric releases research on AI's energy consumption; report forecasts AI's impact on electricity use and HVAC energy efficiency. Presented at IEA conference.
news.summary: At the recent IEA global conference, two significant reports were presented. One report delves into potential scenarios regarding AI's electricity usage in the upcoming decade. The other report showcases the benefits of AI-driven HVAC systems in enhancing energy efficiency. These findings come as part of the ongoing research by experts in the field. The conference has attracted a wide audience, including representatives from various companies keen on staying updated on technological advancements. The reports shed light on the increasing role of AI in energy consumption and efficiency, providing valuable insights for future planning.

news.headline: PUMA partners with adam&eveDDB for new global brand strategy in 2025. Founded in 1948, PUMA aims to establish as top sports brand.
news.summary: PUMA, a renowned global sports company, based in HERZOGENAURACH, Germany, is collaborating with creative agency adam&eveDDB to implement a fresh brand marketing approach in 2025. The goal is to position PUMA as a top sports performance brand. Established in 1948 by Rudolf Dassler, PUMA's inception was driven by the aim to produce sports footwear that enables athletes to reflect the agility, speed, and essence of a puma. Over 75 years, PUMA has led the way in innovation.

news.headline: Milking cows on large US dairy farms is a major concern due to disease spread, with potential for bird flu transmission.
news.summary: Health experts are concerned about disease transmission on the large dairy farms in America due to the vast milking operations. The size of these farms increases the risk of spreading diseases among the livestock. This is a pressing issue as these farms hold considerable numbers of cows for milking, with some housing thousands of cows at a time. The scale of milking on these farms amplifies the potential for disease transmission, making it imperative to implement strict hygiene protocols to safeguard the health of the livestock and prevent outbreaks on these operations.

news.headline: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang dodges billions in taxes by exploiting federal estate and gift tax loopholes amid changes.
news.summary: Nvidia's CEO, Jensen Huang, has utilized loopholes in federal estate and gift tax laws that have recently seen significant changes.

news.headline: The demise of NFTs – but support remains. Despite the craze peak and crash, advocates persist in the unique token market.
news.summary: The enthusiastic hype surrounding nonfungible tokens attracted the crypto community to art auctions. Even though the bubble has since deflated, a portion of individuals continue to hold onto their belief in the potential of NFTs.

news.headline: Bitcoin's value hits $100,000 in milestone achievement after a long, turbulent journey.
XWELL CEO Ezra Ernst's letter outlines goals for 2025 - focus on liberating wellness, unifying brands, and accelerating growth.
news.summary: In New York on December 5, 2024, XWELL, Inc. (Nasdaq: XWEL), a leading provider of wellness solutions for individuals with a busy lifestyle, shared news of the release of an open letter to shareholders by the company's Chief Executive Officer, Ezra Ernst. The communication outlines the Company’s ambitious business goals for the year 2025, concentrating on three main pillars: enhancing wellness opportunities, consolidating its brand presence, and driving rapid expansion.

news.headline: BranchOut Food Inc. receives $250K PO, aims for $5-6M in 2025 sales. Q1 2025: $4.0M revenue (up 170% YoY), targets cash flow.
news.summary: Anticipating a net revenue of $4.0 million for the first quarter of 2025, showing a remarkable growth of 170% compared to the previous year. The company also aims to attain positive cash flow within the same quarter.

news.headline: 79% of manufacturers plan to use AI to address high-skilled labor shortage, aiming to democratize work.
news.summary: Utilization of artificial intelligence (AI) is planned to enhance and make high-skilled work accessible to a wider group amidst an ongoing scarcity of skilled workers. The incorporation of AI technology aims to bridge the gap in required expertise.

news.headline: Jyske Realkredit is issuing a new fixed-rate DKK-denominated callable bond from Capital Centre E.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Jyske Realkredit announced that they will be launching a new fixed-rate bond through Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S with announcement no. 101/2024. The bond, to be issued from Capital Centre E, will be a DKK-denominated and fixed-rate callable bond.

news.headline: CFRA Research partners with Bank Audi Suisse, providing exclusive global equity research to investment professionals.
news.summary: An exclusive partnership has been announced by CFRA in New York, enabling the Bank Audi Suisse team of investment professionals to expand their access to global equity research. This collaboration aims to provide valuable insights and analysis to the team, facilitating informed investment decisions. The partnership is set to broaden the scope of research available to the Bank Audi Suisse professionals, enhancing their ability to navigate the global equity market landscape effectively. This move signifies a strategic investment in research capabilities and is poised to benefit the investment professionals at Bank Audi Suisse significantly.

news.summary: In the latest data released, it was reported that the economy grew by 5.2% in the last quarter, which surpasses the previous estimate of 4.7%. Additionally, the unemployment rate dropped to 3.8%, marking a decrease of 0.5% from the previous month. The stock market also experienced a significant boost, with the main index rising by 700 points, reaching an all-time high. Furthermore, there was a substantial increase in exports by 12.4% compared to the same period last year. Overall, these positive indicators point towards a strong and thriving economy.

Landsbankinn to offer subordinated bonds, LBANK T2I 36, via auction on December 12 at 15:00.
news.summary: Landsbankinn is set to release a fresh set of subordinated bonds, known as LBANK T2I 36, which will be available for purchase through an auction scheduled for Thursday, December 12th, starting at 15:00.

Outfit7 launches Talking Tom Blast Park on Apple Arcade, offering fans exclusive access to over 200 games.

news.headline: Binance boosts trading with added pairs and bots, enhancing user experience with more options. Read more for details.
news.summary: Binance has introduced new trading pairs and trading bot services on its platform to improve user experience and broaden trading opportunities. The addition of these features aims to provide users with more diverse options for trading.
